description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte gray and black finish accented by subtle teal highlights. The stock is robust and angular, with a padded buttplate and a skeletonized structure for reduced weight. The receiver is boxy and integrated with a prominent magazine well, while the handguard is vented and extends forward to a barrel with a visible muzzle brake. The rifle is equipped with a compact, low-profile sighting system mounted on the top rail. Additional details include ergonomic grips, a trigger guard, and a side-mounted accessory rail, suggesting modularity and adaptability for urban operations.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, vented handguard, and compact sight, finished in gray, black, and teal accents.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, skeletonized stock, vented handguard, and all major components.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, barrel opening, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile revealing the magazine well, stock structure, and accessory rail.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the padded buttplate, stock design, and alignment of the receiver.
